candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total/subtotal when identical values are shown.
Also a valid revenue label, but appears to duplicate Sales exactly and is more of a total/subtotal presentation.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue label changes over time; Sales is preferred because Total Revenue duplicates it in the preview.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service input costs on the income statement.
Could be a COGS component, but appears as a likely subcomponent/empty detail rather than the primary reported cost line.
Inventory asset line, not an income statement expense; not appropriate for COGS mapping.

variables.notes: Selected the main income statement cost line rather than a balance sheet inventory row or an apparent subcomponent.

candidates.why: Could be an overhead component, but appears as an empty/detail line under Materials and services and is more likely part of COGS than SG&A here.
Clear operating overhead personnel cost component.
Likely a subcomponent of Staff costs rather than the main reported row.
Likely a subcomponent of Staff costs rather than the main reported row.
Clear operating overhead bucket and populated main row.
Dedicated R&D line exists, but appears below operating profit in the statement order, so should not be added to SG&A components under the placement rule.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the best overhead buckets and excluded depreciation, COGS, and below-EBIT R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D label exists; suitable for XRD even though it appears below operating profit in the statement order.

variables.notes: Mapped dedicated R&D line to XRD. It was not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS because it appears below Reported Operating Profit in the preview.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line and likely available across years; acceptable fallback if a specific interest expense line is missing.
Most semantically precise label for interest expense and therefore preferred when available.

variables.notes: Using a priority list: specific Interest Expense first, then broader Financial Expense as fallback.

candidates.why: Not a book equity/shareholders' equity line; not appropriate for BE.
Best direct equity line and preferable to total equity including minority interest.
Includes minority interest, which would double count if MIB is also mapped separately.
Balancing row, not preferred over direct reported equity.
Balancing row, not preferred over direct reported equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Not an equity measure.
Whole balance sheet total, not book equity.

variables.notes: Selected Total Equity for BE and mapped minority interest separately to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not the balance sheet minority equity balance preferred for MIB.
Best balance sheet label for minority/non-controlling interest.
Alternative balance sheet label for the same concept; useful as fallback across years.
Combined total including parent equity and minority interest; not suitable when separate NCI lines exist.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list; excluded combined total to avoid overlap with BE.
